airport.name: Tianjin Binhai International Airport
airport.toCity: Take metro line 2 or airport shuttle bus to city center.

transport.metro: Efficient metro system covering key tourist areas.
transport.taxi: Taxis available; ensure meters are used.
tips: Avoid peak hours for less crowding.

payment.alipay: Widely accepted; link international card for setup.
payment.wechatPay: Common payment method; similar to Alipay.
payment.cash: Useful for small vendors and markets.
payment.foreignCard: Accepted at hotels and large stores.

tips: Book in advance for better availability.
Try local street food for authenticity.

commonScams: Fake tour guides; book through hotels.

emergency.localTip: Show hotel address in Chinese for directions.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) or Autumn (September-October) for mild weather.
touristTips: Keep passport copies in safe place.
Use local SIM for internet access.
Carry an umbrella for sudden rain.
